name: Mixed Tostadas
recipeInstructions:
1. See Burrito Recipe.
2. See Saute/La Agnese 2.
3. Tortillas should be 6 to 7 inches in diameter.
4. Prepare Refried Beans and Casera Sauce; heat separately until hot.
5. Heat 1/8-inch of oil in a skillet over medium heat just until hot.
6. Cook tortillas, one at a time in the hot oil, until crisp, about 1 minute; drain.
7. Spread each tortilla with 1/4 cup of beans, top with 2 tablespoons of the sauce, 1/3 cup of the chicken and 2 more tablespoons of the sauce.
8. Sprinkle each with 2 tablespoons of cheese.
9. Set oven control to broil.
10. Place tortillas on a rack in the broiler pan. Broil with tops 2 to 3 inches from the heat until cheese is melted, about 3 minutes.
11. Top each tortilla with 1/2 cup of lettuce, 2 slices of avocado and sour cream.
